proof fn phi_2_remove_helper5_head_becomes_second<T: Copy, const N: usize>(
    old_sll: StaticLinkedList<T, N>,

)

        new_sll@.contains(w),
        old_sll.get_node_ref(w) == new_sll.get_node_ref(w),
    ensures
        new_sll.get_node_ref(w) == old_sll.get_node_ref(w),
